categories: snacks, salty-snacks, appetizers, biscuits-and-crackers, da:crackers, pretzel
creator: odinh
data_sources: App - Open Food Facts, Apps, App - Yuka

agribalyse.name_en: Salty snacks, mini pretzels or sticks
agribalyse.name_fr: Biscuit apéritif, mini bretzel ou sticks

ingredients_text: Sticks 60% [wheat flour, rapeseed oil, salt, acid stabilizer: sodium hydroxide, raising agent: sodium bi-carbonate], compound milk coating 40% [sugar, fully hydrogenated vegetable fat: palm kernel, fat reduced cocoa powder, whey powder milk, skimmed milk powder, emulsifier: soya lecithin and E 476, flavours]. Product may contain peanuts and tree nuts, sesame seeds.
ingredients_text_en: Sticks 60% [wheat flour, rapeseed oil, salt, acid stabilizer: sodium hydroxide, raising agent: sodium bi-carbonate], compound milk coating 40% [sugar, fully hydrogenated vegetable fat: palm kernel, fat reduced cocoa powder, whey powder milk, skimmed milk powder, emulsifier: soya lecithin and E 476, flavours]. Product may contain peanuts and tree nuts, sesame seeds.
ingredients_text_nb: Kjeks 60% {_Hvetemel_, rapsolje, salt, surhetsregulerende (E524), hevemiddel (E500)}, Melketrekk 40% {Sukker, vegetabilskfett (palmeolje, fettredusert kakaopulver, _mysepulver_, skummetmelke-pulver, emulgator (soya-lecitin og E476), aromaer}.

Product may contain peanuts and tree nuts, sesame seeds.
